summary.zh: 一个不抢走注意力的个人智能界面。
summary.en: A personal intelligence interface that does not demand attention.

description.zh: 探索低打扰 AI 的产品原型。系统根据工作语境提供小而及时的介入，并把不确定性明确呈现给使用者。
description.en: A product prototype for low-interruption AI. It offers small, timely interventions based on work context while making uncertainty legible to the user.

role.zh: 产品策略、体验设计、前端工程
role.en: Product strategy, experience design, front-end engineering

outcome.zh: 完成 12 周封闭测试，日活留存 72%
